nation: Fond du Lac Denesuline First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Fond du Lac First Nation Development Limited Partnership (99.9999%), Fond du Lac First Nation (2008) Development Corporation (100%), Waterfound Development Corp (33.33%), and Waterfound Development Limited Partnership (33.33%). Equity pickup from GBEs was $3,617,471. Also member of PAGC, AHA, ADCFS, AERC, ADEA, ADNLC, and Ya thi Nene.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing budget information (no comparative budget figures available). Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Fond du Lac Mineral Resources Inc, Fond du Lac Power Corporation, Fond du Lac Hydro Inc. Four GBEs on modified equity basis. Fond du Lac Specific Claim Trust excluded as it is controlled by external Trustees. Restricted cash includes capital project accounts and CMHC reserves. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness + accounts payable + due to related parties + current portion of long-term debt + current portion of CMHC mortgages. CMHC mortgages long-term portion $821,520 plus long-term debt $245,250 plus current portions included in current liabilities. Province is Saskatchewan not Alberta.
